name: 5B Unit 1 - It's Chinese New Year
description: 關於 Chinese New Year 的閱讀理解問答
creator: 系統預置

questions.question: Why didn't people sweep the floor on the first day of Chinese New Year in the past?
questions.answer: It was because people believed it would sweep away the good luck for the New Year.

questions.question: What did Ben get from his relatives?
questions.answer: He got many red packets from them.

questions.question: Why do people like buying mandarin trees at Chinese New Year?
questions.answer: It is because the Chinese words for mandarins and luck sound similar.

questions.question: Did Max think he would get red packets too? Why or why not?
questions.answer: No, he didn't. It was because he thought he was not their family member.
